raw_consumer_statement: I have 2 separate CitiBank credit card accounts. I took advantage of their balance transfer option. The account balance was transferred in total and then they sent me a refund check in the amount of the balance transfer. I called to reassure that I was indeed due a refund check and was told by a representative that I was. I cashed it and was told that I had to pay it in full 2 months later. I cant get in contact with someone to settle this matter.
